title: GitHub - iBala/open-artifact: Publish, share and comment on the HTML and Markdown your coding agent writes. Self-hosted.
excerpt: Publish, share and comment on the HTML and Markdown your coding agent writes. Self-hosted. - iBala/open-artifact
content_html:
Your coding agent writes a report, a design doc, a dashboard. Right now that lands as a file on your laptop that nobody else can see.

Open Artifact gives it a URL. The agent publishes, you get a link, you share it with the people who need to read it. They comment on the exact paragraph they are reacting to, and the agent reads those comments back and revises. You host all of it yourself.

  • Publish from the agent. One command, or the bundled skill so the agent does it without being asked.
  • HTML and Markdown. HTML runs in a sandbox with no access to your session. Markdown is rendered with headings, tables and syntax highlighting.
  • Share deliberately. Private by default. Open it to named people, to everyone at your email domain, or to anyone with the link.
  • Comment on a specific line. Comments hold their position when the document is republished, and say so plainly when the text they pointed at is gone.
  • Feedback loop. The agent reads the comments and publishes a new version.

Use it free at open-artifact.com

Don't want to run a server? The hosted instance is live and free: open-artifact.com. Sign up with your email, connect your assistant, and start publishing — nothing to deploy. Everything below this is for when you'd rather host your own.

Try it in two minutes

git clone https://github.com/iBala/open-artifact.git
cd open-artifact
pnpm install
pnpm --filter @open-artifact/server dev

Open http://localhost:3000. With no mail server configured, sign-in codes are printed to the terminal, so you can sign in and click around without setting up anything else.

Run it for real

Everything you need is in deploy/.

cp deploy/env.example .env      # then fill in BASE_URL, SESSION_SECRET, SMTP
docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml up -d

Two things to know before you go live:

Put a reverse proxy in front of it. The container binds to localhost only, on purpose. Terminate TLS with Caddy, nginx or Traefik and forward to it.

You need a mail server. Sign-in codes and share notifications go out over SMTP. Amazon SES, Postmark, Fastmail, your own — anything that speaks SMTP. Without it, nobody can sign in.

Then prove the install works:

./deploy/smoke.sh https://artifacts.example.com

That signs in, publishes, checks the sandbox headers are really being sent, shares, comments, republishes and confirms the comment kept its place. If it passes, the instance is good.

Who can sign up

SIGNUP_MODE decides. invite-only is the default: an account is created only for someone an artifact was shared with. domain-allowlist opens it to listed email domains. open lets anyone in. Every setting is explained in deploy/env.example, and the server refuses to boot with a clear message if something is missing or contradictory.

Connect your agent

Two ways in, depending on whether the assistant has a terminal.

Has a terminal (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and friends) — hand your assistant one sentence and let it set itself up:

Set up Open Artifact for me. Install the CLI — npm install -g open-artifact --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ — then read https://open-artifact.com/setup.md and follow it.

Every instance serves its own /setup.md, so swap in your own address when you self-host. That page walks the assistant through installing, signing you in, and saving the skill. The skill itself lives in skill/.

No terminal (Claude on the web, ChatGPT) — the hosted MCP endpoint. Add https://artifacts.example.com/mcp as a custom connector in the app's settings; the instance walks the connector through OAuth and shows a consent page. A connection can publish, update and share its own documents and read their comments — and deliberately cannot delete anything, make anything public, or read documents other people shared with you. MCP_DESIGN.md has the reasoning. Header-capable tools can skip OAuth: mint a token under Settings → Sessions → "Connect an assistant" and send it as Authorization: Bearer ….

How the pieces fit

Folder What it is
packages/server Hono API, SQLite via Drizzle, auth, sharing, comments
packages/web React and Vite front end
packages/cli The open-artifact command the agent runs
packages/shared Types and validation both sides use
packages/e2e Playwright tests against a real browser
skill/ The agent instructions
deploy/ Compose file, environment template, smoke test

The database is one SQLite file. Back that file up and you have backed up the whole instance. The compose file includes a nightly backup that uses SQLite's own .backup command, not a file copy, because copying a live database gives you a corrupt one.

Working on it

pnpm install
pnpm test          # unit and integration
pnpm lint
pnpm typecheck
pnpm --filter @open-artifact/e2e test    # browser tests

Tests come first here. If you are adding behaviour, the test that describes it should exist before the code that satisfies it.

Found a bug, or want something?

Open an issue on GitHub: github.com/iBala/open-artifact/issues. Bug reports, feature requests and rough ideas are all welcome — that's where we track what to build next.

Licence

Open Artifact is fair-code, under the Sustainable Use License — the same licence n8n uses. You can self-host and modify it for free, including inside a company. You cannot sell it or run it as a commercial hosted service without a commercial licence. For that, or for an enterprise arrangement (SSO/SAML, audit logs, dedicated hosting), email hello@open-artifact.com.

sentences.en: Your coding agent writes a report, a design doc, a dashboard.
sentences.zh: 您的编码代理编写报告、设计文档、仪表板。

sentences.en: Right now that lands as a file on your laptop that nobody else can see.
sentences.zh: 现在，它作为文件保存在您的笔记本电脑上，其他人都看不到。

blocks.html_en: Open Artifact gives it a URL. The agent publishes, you get a link, you share it with the people who need to read it. They comment on the exact paragraph they are reacting to, and the agent reads those comments back and revises. You host all of it yourself.

sentences.en: Open Artifact gives it a URL.
sentences.zh: Open Artifact 为其提供了一个 URL。

sentences.en: The agent publishes, you get a link, you share it with the people who need to read it.
sentences.zh: 代理发布，您得到一个链接，您与需要阅读它的人分享。

sentences.en: They comment on the exact paragraph they are reacting to, and the agent reads those comments back and revises.
sentences.zh: 他们对他们正在做出反应的确切段落进行评论，然后代理会读回这些评论并进行修改。

sentences.en: You host all of it yourself.
sentences.zh: 您自己主持所有这一切。

blocks.html_en: • HTML and Markdown. HTML runs in a sandbox with no access to your session. Markdown is rendered with headings, tables and syntax highlighting.

sentences.en: HTML and Markdown.
sentences.zh: HTML 和 Markdown。

sentences.en: HTML runs in a sandbox with no access to your session.
sentences.zh: HTML 在沙箱中运行，无法访问您的会话。

sentences.en: Markdown is rendered with headings, tables and syntax highlighting.

blocks.html_en: • Comment on a specific line. Comments hold their position when the document is republished, and say so plainly when the text they pointed at is gone.

sentences.en: Comments hold their position when the document is republished, and say so plainly when the text they pointed at is gone.
sentences.zh: 当文档重新发布时，评论将保持其立场，并且当他们所指向的文本消失时，也会清楚地表明这一点。

blocks.html_en: • Feedback loop. The agent reads the comments and publishes a new version.

sentences.en: Feedback loop.
sentences.zh: 反馈循环。

sentences.zh: 代理阅读评论并发布新版本。

sentences.en: Tests come first here.
sentences.zh: 测试是第一位的。

sentences.en: If you are adding behaviour, the test that describes it should exist before the code that satisfies it.
sentences.zh: 如果您要添加行为，则描述它的测试应该存在于满足它的代码之前。

blocks.html_en: Found a bug, or want something?

sentences.en: Found a bug, or want something?
sentences.zh: 发现错误，或者想要什么？

blocks.html_en: Open an issue on GitHub: github.com/iBala/open-artifact/issues. Bug reports, feature requests and rough ideas are all welcome — that's where we track what to build next.

sentences.en: Open an issue on GitHub: github.com/iBala/open-artifact/issues.
sentences.zh: 在 GitHub 上打开问题：github.com/iBala/open-artifact/issues。

sentences.en: Bug reports, feature requests and rough ideas are all welcome — that's where we track what to build next.
sentences.zh: 错误报告、功能请求和粗略想法都是受欢迎的——这就是我们跟踪下一步要构建的内容的地方。

blocks.html_en: Licence

sentences.en: Licence
sentences.zh: 执照

blocks.html_en: Open Artifact is fair-code, under the Sustainable Use License — the same licence n8n uses. You can self-host and modify it for free, including inside a company. You cannot sell it or run it as a commercial hosted service without a commercial licence. For that, or for an enterprise arrangement (SSO/SAML, audit logs, dedicated hosting), email hello@open-artifact.com.

sentences.en: Open Artifact is fair-code, under the Sustainable Use License — the same licence n8n uses.
sentences.zh: Open Artifact 是公平代码，遵循可持续使用许可证 — 与 n8n 使用的许可证相同。

sentences.en: You can self-host and modify it for free, including inside a company.
sentences.zh: 您可以免费自行托管和修改它，包括在公司内部。

sentences.en: You cannot sell it or run it as a commercial hosted service without a commercial licence.
sentences.zh: 如果没有商业许可，您不能将其出售或作为商业托管服务运行。

sentences.en: For that, or for an enterprise arrangement (SSO/SAML, audit logs, dedicated hosting), email hello@open-artifact.com.
sentences.zh: 为此或企业安排（SSO/SAML、审核日志、专用托管），请发送电子邮件至 hello@open-artifact.com。

content_html_zh:
您的编码代理编写报告、设计文档、仪表板。 现在，它作为文件保存在您的笔记本电脑上，其他人都看不到。

Open Artifact 为其提供了一个 URL。 代理发布，您得到一个链接，您与需要阅读它的人分享。 他们对他们正在做出反应的确切段落进行评论，然后代理会读回这些评论并进行修改。 您自己主持所有这一切。

  • 从代理发布。 一个命令或捆绑技能，以便代理无需询问即可执行操作。
  • HTML 和 Markdown。 HTML 在沙箱中运行，无法访问您的会话。 Markdown 通过标题、表格和语法突出显示来呈现。
  • 刻意分享。 默认为私有。 向指定人员、您电子邮件域中的每个人或知道链接的任何人打开它。
  • 对特定行进行评论。 当文档重新发布时，评论将保持其立场，并且当他们所指向的文本消失时，也会清楚地表明这一点。
  • 反馈循环。 代理阅读评论并发布新版本。

在 open-artifact.com 上免费使用它

不想运行服务器？ 托管实例是实时且免费的：open-artifact.com。 使用您的电子邮件注册，连接您的助手，然后开始发布 - 无需部署。 下面的所有内容都适用于您想要自己托管的情况。

两分钟后尝试一下

git clone https://github.com/iBala/open-artifact.git
cd open-artifact
pnpm install
pnpm --filter @open-artifact/server dev

打开http://localhost:3000。如果未配置邮件服务器，登录代码将打印到终端，因此您可以登录并单击，无需进行其他任何设置。

真正运行它

你需要的一切都在deploy/中。

cp deploy/env.example .env      # then fill in BASE_URL, SESSION_SECRET, SMTP
docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml up -d

上线前需要了解两件事：

在它前面放一个反向代理。 容器有意仅绑定到本地主机。 使用 Caddy、nginx 或 Traefik 终止 TLS 并转发给它。

您需要一个邮件服务器。 登录代码和共享通知通过 SMTP 发出。 Amazon SES、Postmark、Fastmail、您自己的邮件 — 任何使用 SMTP 的邮件。 没有它，任何人都无法登录。

然后证明安装有效：

./deploy/smoke.sh https://artifacts.example.com

登录、发布、检查沙箱标头是否确实发送、共享、评论、重新发布并确认评论保留其位置。 如果通过，则实例是好的。

谁可以报名

SIGNUP_MODE 决定。 默认情况下仅限邀请：仅为共享工件的某人创建帐户。 域白名单将其打开到列出的电子邮件域。 开放让任何人进入。 每个设置都在deploy/env.example中进行了解释，如果某些内容丢失或矛盾，服务器将拒绝启动并显示明确的消息。

连接您的代理

两种方式进入，具体取决于助手是否有终端。

有一个终端（Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 和朋友）——交给你的助手一句话，让它自行设置：

为我设置 Open Artifact。 安装 CLI — npm install -g open-artifact --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ — 然后阅读 https://open-artifact.com/setup.md 并按照它操作。

每个实例都有自己的 /setup.md，因此当您自行托管时，请交换您自己的地址。 该页面将引导助手完成安装、登录和保存技能的过程。 技能本身存在于技能/中。

无终端（网络上的 Claude、ChatGPT）— 托管的 MCP 端点。 在应用程序的设置中添加 https://artifacts.example.com/mcp 作为自定义连接器；该实例引导连接器通过 OAuth 并显示同意页面。 联系人可以发布、更新和共享自己的文档并阅读他们的评论，并且故意不能删除任何内容、公开任何内容或阅读其他人与您共享的文档。 MCP_DESIGN.md 有推理。 支持标头的工具可以跳过 OAuth：在“设置”→“会话”→“连接助手”下创建一个令牌，并将其作为“授权：持有者...”发送。

各部分如何搭配

文件夹 它是什么
包/服务器 Hono API、通过 Drizzle 的 SQLite、身份验证、共享、评论
包/网络 React 和 Vite 前端
包/cli 代理运行的 open-artifact 命令
包/共享 双方使用的类型和验证
包/e2e 剧作家针对真实浏览器进行测试
skill/ 代理指示
部署/ 撰写文件、环境模板、冒烟测试

数据库是一个 SQLite 文件。 备份该文件，您就备份了整个实例。 撰写文件包括使用 SQLite 自己的 .backup 命令的夜间备份，而不是文件副本，因为复制实时数据库会导致数据库损坏。

正在努力

pnpm install
pnpm test          # unit and integration
pnpm lint
pnpm typecheck
pnpm --filter @open-artifact/e2e test    # browser tests

测试是第一位的。 如果您要添加行为，则描述它的测试应该存在于满足它的代码之前。

发现错误，或者想要什么？

在 GitHub 上打开问题：github.com/iBala/open-artifact/issues。 错误报告、功能请求和粗略想法都是受欢迎的——这就是我们跟踪下一步要构建的内容的地方。

执照

Open Artifact 是公平代码，遵循可持续使用许可证 — 与 n8n 使用的许可证相同。 您可以免费自行托管和修改它，包括在公司内部。 如果没有商业许可，您不能将其出售或作为商业托管服务运行。 为此或企业安排（SSO/SAML、审核日志、专用托管），请发送电子邮件至 hello@open-artifact.com。
